programmes.show_description: The team pursues an Amber Alert during New Year's Eve; Carisi faces Counselor Rafael Barba in the courtroom.
Reese is forced to revisit his past when the Machine produces the number of a computer analyst who seems to be stealing confidential information.
Shaw escapes her captors, but the team is unsure of her mental state when she begins to act paranoid and reckless.
A woman makes a desperate attempt to frame her friend right in front of deputies. A driver's assortment of containers raises some questions.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Semper Fidelis: US crime drama series. Gibbs is tasked with investigating the murder of an ICE agent at the home of the secretary of the navy.
Aliyah: Drama series. Tony faces the consequences of his deadly encounter with Michael Rivkin. The agents fly to Israel to present Tony's case to the head of Mossad.
Truth or Consequences: Crime drama series involving Navy and Marine Corps personnel. As the team searches for Ziva's replacement, the past still weighs heavily on everybody's minds.
Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of an investment analyst who sold shares in a bankrupt company.
Briscoe and Green investigate the possibility that a student has been stabbed in order to stop him exposing the poor health and safety practices. .
Briscoe and Green are knee-deep in suspects after a drug called dazzle is found in the body of a young woman who fell from the roof of her art studio.
When a body is found outside the Chinese Consul, Briscoe and Green suspect political suicide. Only when murder is suspected does the case get complicated.
An investigation into the murder of a wealthy teenage girl leads the detectives to an abandoned car and a second body.
When one half of a two-man gambling corporation turns up dead, Briscoe and Green go after his partner.
Crime drama series. The NCIS team races against time to thwart a terrorist plot to unleash a dirty bomb on DC.
Jack-Knife. After a driver from a shady shipping company is found dead, the NCIS team take to the road to bring down the illegal operation.
Crime drama series. Gibbs is forced to revisit his past when his former mother-in-law turns out to be a witness in a murder investigation.
When the BAU team travels to Denver to investigate several murders, Prentiss is forced to evaluate her relationship with Special Agent Andrew Mendoza.
The investigation into a sex-for-housing scheme expands, putting Benson's loyalty to Garland to the test. Rollins and Carisi attempt to keep their witnesses on board.
Chief McGrath leans on Garland and Benson to produce results, and the search for a missing witness leads Fin and Kat down a dangerous path.
The squad investigates a potentially violent  situation stemming from a role-play session on a camming website when one user decides to meet his idol in person.
Carisi faces a powerful judge when he inexplicably dismisses a case involving a university student's rape.
NCIS investigates a murder related to a car that begins driving on its own.
A student is accused of killing his teacher; when the suspect's age puts the case in limbo, Price and Maroun put the school's policies on trial.
Fleeing suspects risk their safety by hiding in a dangerous swamp. For one driver, a broken truck turns out to be the start of a very long list of problems.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Reunion: Drama series following the US Navy's dedicated federal agency. The team discovers that the murder of a Marine may be linked to their past. Gibbs decides Ziva's fate.
US crime drama. Gibbs and the team must reopen a closed case when a blogger with a reputation for exposing government cover-ups is murdered.
Good Cop, Bad Cop: US crime drama. The discovery of a dead marine off the coast of Tanzania unearths a shocking case of foul play on board a Jordanian freighter.
When a private detective is found dead, Briscoe and Green realise that any one of the people he was investigating could be to blame.
When the wife of a defence lawyer is found dead in her car, Briscoe and Green investigate the possibility that she was not the intended target.
A murder victim is revealed as a doctor who had been writing fraudulent prescriptions for the painkiller oxycodone.
The team experience mixed feelings when they find themselves prosecuting a priest for the murder of an evil drug dealer.
When a jewellery store is robbed, the team immediately set about tracking down a civic-minded witness.
Briscoe and Green think they have found the murderer of a car salesman who was bludgeoned to death, but there is more to the killing than meets the eye.
Double Identity: Crime drama series involving Navy and Marine Corps personnel. The NCIS team make a surprising discovery while investigating the shooting of a Marine.
Jurisdiction: The NCIS team works with the Coast Guard Investigative Service when a Navy diver seeking sunken treasure is murdered.
Guilty Pleasure: Crime drama series following the US navy's dedicated federal agency. The team asks Holly Snow for help after the death of a navy officer is linked to a call girl.
Frank works to vindicate a detective accused of excessive force, while Danny and Baez track down the killer responsible for the death of a rapper's bodyguard.
Frank is conflicted about how to deal with a former officer's gripe about his pension. Jamie helps a friend deal with an illicit picture of his daughter on the internet.
Benson and Rollins must contend with the FBI and the Organized Crime bureau when a rape victim identifies a dangerous mobster as her assailant.
The SVU searches for a serial rapist who preys on mothers with young children. Benson and Fin struggle under the tightened reins of Chief McGrath.
